column1: # Pinned host genomes: species listed here are NOT resolved/downloaded from NCBI — the pipeline
# uses the single local FASTA you point to (e.g. a T2T reference you keep once and reuse).
# Human and mouse are pinned by default (T2T). Add rows for any host you want to pin.
# Columns: host_species <tab> genome_path <tab> label     (lines starting with # are ignored)
